Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1701}Excuse me... Could I trouble you for a moment?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1701}Have you seen a kitty cat around here?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1701}She's a precious little white, spotted cat named Mii-chan. She slipped away when I wasn't looking.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1701}I'm so worried about where she could have gone...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1701}She's getting on in her years like me, so I doubt she could have gotten very far.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}A white, spotted cat... Did you see one, {f 4 2}-san?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1701}Goodness, really!? Where might this have been?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1701}Thank you, dear! I'll go look for her.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1701}I've been so worried... I hope my little Mii-chan is eating all right...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1701}Thank you for your help. I'll try looking elsewhere.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}A white, spotted cat named Mii-chan...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}If you don't mind, {f 4 2}-san... could we help her look?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Being separated from a loved one can be very distressing after all...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 0 25 25}Um, what's the phrase usually used in situations like these?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 1 25 25}{f 4 21 7 7}"What goes around, comes around to hit you in the back of the head"![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}But if they remain separated, she will feel the same pain that Koromaru-san once did...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 0 25 25}If we help, I think we can at least reduce the chances of that happening![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems I can't turn her down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}She might be so hungry she could eat a house.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_4_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}In any case, we should hurry.[n]{f 1 1}
